title: Manufacturing Engineer - Havells India Consulting Pvt Ltd - 2025 Hiring Drive

jsonLd.title: Manufacturing Engineer - Havells India Consulting Pvt Ltd - 2025 Hiring Drive
jsonLd.description:
Havells India Consulting Pvt Ltd is actively seeking a talented and motivated Manufacturing Engineer to join our dynamic team in Dhanbad. This is an excellent opportunity for professionals who are passionate about making a real impact in a fast-growing organization.

About Havells India Consulting Pvt Ltd:
Havells India Consulting Pvt Ltd is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Oversee daily production operations to meet output targets
• Ensure product quality meets internal and customer specifications
• Train and supervise shop floor workers and supervisors
• Implement lean manufacturing and continuous improvement initiatives
• Manage supplier quality audits and vendor development
• Coordinate with design and engineering teams on product improvements
• Prepare production cost analysis and efficiency reports

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Arch / M.Arch from recognized institution
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in FMEA
• Proficiency in PPAP
• Proficiency in Root Cause Analysis
• Proficiency in APQP
• Proficiency in Statistical Process Control
• Proficiency in 5S
• Proficiency in GD&T
• Proficiency in Quality Control

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Learning & development budget
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Dhanbad, Jharkhand, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Havells India Consulting Pvt Ltd!
